_comment: Hand-labeled ground-truth criteria for tests/fixtures/tender_housekeeping_demo.pdf. The 'core_required' set is the 7 PQC items the synthetic tender explicitly mandates (see scripts/generate_synthetic_vendors.py, Section 1 PQC items). The 'agent_inferred' set captures extras the agent reasonably surfaces from Section 4 Special Conditions and the cover-page meta — these are tolerated extras whose count and IDs may shift run-to-run. The regression test asserts only that the core set is present with correct IDs and threshold values; agent_inferred is informational.

core_required.name: Average Annual Turnover
core_required.notes: Avg annual turnover over FY 2023-24 / 2022-23 / 2021-22 must be >= 100 lakhs (MSME relaxed to 85 lakhs).

core_required.name: Similar Works Experience
core_required.notes: At least one similar housekeeping/sanitation/facility-cleaning contract of >= 100 lakhs in the last 7 years (MSME relaxed to 85 lakhs).

core_required.name: PAN Card Submission
core_required.notes: Self-attested PAN card. Mandatory document; no numeric threshold.

core_required.name: GST Registration Certificate
core_required.notes: Self-attested GST REG-06. Mandatory document; no numeric threshold.

core_required.name: Udyam Registration Certificate
core_required.notes: Udyam certificate — mandatory only if claiming MSME relaxation under PQC-1 / PQC-2.

core_required.name: Blacklisting Declaration
core_required.notes: Signed declaration on bidder letterhead confirming non-blacklisting. Mandatory.

core_required.name: Bidder Response Form
core_required.notes: Completed and signed Bidder Response Form per Annexure B. Mandatory.

agent_inferred.notes: Lifted from Special Conditions. Could equally be classified commercial.
Lifted from Special Conditions; police verification of deployed personnel.
Bidder shall provide PPE to all deployed personnel.
EPF + ESI statutory compliance with monthly remittance evidence.
Bidder responsible for shift-cover during paid leave.
0.5% of monthly contract value per day of significant non-performance, capped at 10%.
Consumables (cleaning agents, mops, brooms, garbage bags, restroom supplies) within scope at no extra cost.
Statutory minimum wage compliance; indicative wage table provided.
Earnest Money Deposit Rs. 4.80 Lakhs, lifted from cover-page meta.
